items.title_en: UK hopes to lure expats back from the UAE as war challenges Dubai's appeal
items.title_zh: 由于战争挑战迪拜的吸引力，英国希望吸引阿联酋的外国人回国

items.desc_zh: 由于中东战争动摇了人们对迪拜避风港形象的信心，英国正在寻求吸引英国居民从阿联酋回国。

items.title_en: Japan scraps ban on lethal weapons exports in major shift of pacifist policy
items.title_zh: 日本废除致命武器出口禁令，和平主义政策发生重大转变
items.desc_en: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said that "no single country can now protect its own peace and security alone."
items.desc_zh: 日本首相高市早苗表示，“现在没有任何一个国家能够单独保护自己的和平与安全”。

items.title_en: Oil falls as investors assess mixed messaging on Iran peace talks ahead of ceasefire deadline
items.title_zh: 油价下跌，因投资者评估停火期限前伊朗和平谈判的复杂信息
items.desc_en: West Texas Intermediate and Brent had settled 7% and 5% higher on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 西德克萨斯中质原油和布伦特原油周一分别上涨 7% 和 5%。

items.title_en: JPMorgan expands $1.5 trillion economic security splurge into Europe
items.title_zh: 摩根大通将 1.5 万亿美元的经济安全投资扩大到欧洲
items.desc_en: The banking giant is looking to invest in areas deemed critical to economic security, including defense and AI.
items.desc_zh: 这家银行巨头正在寻求投资对经济安全至关重要的领域，包括国防和人工智能。

items.title_en: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
items.title_zh: 日本放宽武器出口规则，打破二战后和平主义
items.desc_en: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.
items.desc_zh: 这为日本向十多个国家出售武器扫清了道路。

items.title_en: Apple incoming CEO John Ternus faces a defining challenge: Fixing the company's AI strategy
items.title_zh: 苹果即将上任的首席执行官 John Ternus 面临着一个决定性的挑战：修正公司的人工智能战略
items.desc_en: Tim Cook had a highly successful tenure as Apple's CEO, but he leaves his successor with a big gap to fill when it comes to the company's position in AI.
items.desc_zh: 蒂姆·库克作为苹果首席执行官的任期非常成功，但在公司在人工智能领域的地位方面，他留给继任者一个巨大的空白需要填补。

items.title_en: Trailblazing black beauty queen who defied apartheid South Africa dies aged 76
